title: myriophyllum spicatum var. exalbescens
intro: Myriophyllum spicatum var. exalbescens, also known as the variable water-milfoil, is a subspecies of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Haloragaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Myriophyllum spicatum var. exalbescens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
